sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰωαννᾶς

- Transliteration: Ioannas

- Phonetic: ee-o-an-nas'

- Definition: Joanna = "grace or gift of God"

1. one of the ancestors of Christ

- Origin: a form of G2491

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: A form of G2491; Joannas an Israelite: - Joannas.
